fps.description: Frame rate in frames per second

audio.title: Audio
audio.description: Input audio file for audio_to_video task

image.title: Image
image.description: First frame image for image-to-video generation

video.title: Video
video.description: Input video for retake or extend tasks

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video to generate

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds

resolution.description: Resolution quality of the generated video. Only 1080p is supported for audio_to_video, retake, and extend tasks.

extend_mode.description: Where to extend the video. Used for extend task.

retake_mode.description: What to replace in the retake section. Used for retake task.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video

camera_motion.description: Camera motion effect to apply to the generated video. Use 'none' for no camera motion.

generate_audio.title: Generate Audio
generate_audio.description: Generate audio for the video. Used for text_to_video and image_to_video tasks.

retake_duration.title: Retake Duration
retake_duration.description: Duration in seconds of the section to edit. Must be at least 2 seconds. Used for retake task.

last_frame_image.title: Last Frame Image
last_frame_image.description: Last frame image for image-to-video generation. When provided, the video interpolates between the first frame and this last frame.

retake_start_time.title: Retake Start Time
retake_start_time.description: Start time in seconds of the section to edit. Used for retake task.
